assumptions_not_explicit_in_paper.decoder_layers: Paper specifies a 3-layer hypernetwork for the output field but does not state the main decoder MLP depth; use the same 5-layer, 256-hidden neural-field backbone as the SDF encoder.
assumptions_not_explicit_in_paper.geometry_inner_lr: Paper gives K=3 inner-loop steps but not alpha; use 0.1 as a configurable CAVIA-style inner learning rate.
assumptions_not_explicit_in_paper.condition_normalization: Paper reports standardized output MSE but does not specify condition normalization; normalize Vx,Vy over the scarce training set for numerical stability.
assumptions_not_explicit_in_paper.boundary_layer_mask_normalization: The local VTK data stores SDF, not normalized inverse distance d_hat; compute d_hat as 1 - abs(sdf) / max(abs(sdf)) per case.
